name: Byrna Technologies Inc.
summary: Byrna Technologies Inc. is a less-lethal self-defense technology company that designs, manufactures, and sells CO2-powered handheld launchers, shoulder-fired launchers, chemical irritant and kinetic projectiles, defensive sprays, and accessories. Products include the Byrna SD, Byrna CL, Byrna LE, Byrna LE PRO, TCR, M4 launchers, and Fox Labs International defensive sprays. The company serves consumer, law enforcement, private security, and corrections markets in the U.S., Canada, and international markets.
